modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty answering calls on Cisco VoIP phone.

full_description_text: I was trying to answer a call on my Cisco VoIP phone, but it just wouldn't connect. I pressed the button several times, and nothing happened. It's really frustrating because I need to take this call. I hope someone can help me figure this out soon.
short_description: Difficulty answering calls on Cisco VoIP phone.
description: I was trying to answer a call on my Cisco VoIP phone, but it just wouldn't connect. I pressed the button several times, and nothing happened. It's really frustrating because I need to take this call. I hope someone can help me figure this out soon.
